project_area: Affordable rental and ownership housing development
demographic_requirements: Projects must increase housing for households experiencing homelessness or other eligible Qualified Populations (QP) as defined by HUD HOME-ARP Notice CPD-21-10.
eligibility_summary: Open to developers, non-profits, and housing service providers within the City of Rochester, New York. Applicants may apply for HOME funding, HOME-ARP funding, or a combination of the two to support affordable housing projects.
